title: betulaster nitida
side_effects: Betulaster nitida can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues in some individuals. Prolonged consumption of extracts from this plant has also been linked to liver damage and gastrointestinal problems. In severe cases, excessive use of betulaster nitida can lead to seizures, coma, or even death. It is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any plant-based remedies to avoid these potential side effects.
